title: Pineapple Peeler and Corer Slicer Cutter Stainless Steel Easy Kitchen Fruit Tool by SameTech
features: Fast, high efficiency to peel, core and slice fresh pineapple in seconds.
With unique detachable wedger and make ready-to-eat chunks of pineapple.
Makes perfectly-shaped rings; preserves shell intact to use as a bowl. Ideal a tools for your pineapple.
Create one slice at a time or cut up the whole fruit at once, keep fresh of the pineapple, retained the juice of the fruit.
Made from durable, stylish stainless steel and plastic handle, easy to Clean, Dishwasher Safe.
description: Specifications: Size:24 x 8.5cm / 9.45" x 3.35". Weight: about 128g / 0.28LB Material: plastic+ Stainless Steel Handle Color: Green, Yellow, Black (Ship random) Using Steps(refer picture for more detail): 1. Connect the handles with blade part, and clean it; 2. Cut off the top part of the pineapple; 3. Center the blade to the pineapple, push and rotate it slowly till the bottom; 4. Pull out the slicer with fruit-meat from shell-part slowly; 5. (If you like chunks)With the unique detachable wedger and make ready-to-eat chunks of pineapple 6. Enjoy your Delicious and beautiful food; Package Included: 1 x Pineapple Slicer 1 x Wedger Device It's a good idea to make a Pineapple Rice meal with the remain shell for your family; Also with the shell remains intact ideal for those who want to use for serving fried rice dishes, drink bowl, desserts, fruit salads etc. Feature of SmeTech Pineapple Slicer: This SameTech stainless steel pineapple slicer cores and slices a whole pineapple quickly and easily. Simply slice off the top of a fresh pineapple and twist the slicer on to the exposed fruit to create perfect pineapple rings. With unique detachable wedger and make ready-to-eat chunks of pineapple. The ratcheting handle makes it easy to core pineapples quickly without having to constantly read just your grip. The turning knob features a comfortable, non-slip grip and separates from the shaft for easy cleaning. The sharp, medium-sized, stainless steel blade was designed to accommodate most pineapple sizes

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Hand Wash, Hand Wash Only, Hand wash only, Handwash, Metal parts are dishwasher safe
